title: Norwegian Fish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew made with fresh fish and spices. Serve with crusty bread for a satisfying meal.

ingredients.name: Light fish broth
ingredients.notes: Use low-sodium for a healthier option

ingredients.name: Carrots
ingredients.notes: Sliced for a pop of color

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Use a pinch for added depth

instructions: Heat the speculaas spice mix and light fish broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced carrots and diced potatoes, and continue to cook for another 5 minutes.
Add the cod fillets to the pot, skin side up.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
